content: State-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agent memory architectures can be re-purposed to solve the core limitation of curiosity-driven reinforcement learning methods (ICM/RND): catastrophic forgetting of previously explored surprising states. By tiering episodic memory of unexpected observations into the active learning agent's dynamic retention/pruning framework, we can preserve useful exploration signal without saturating the agent's memory buffer with trivial novel noise.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
